result.summary: Airwallex exposes a REST API, three MCP servers (Developer sandbox, Docs, and AgentOS production), and a beta CLI; auth is via API key + client ID, partner OAuth apps, or user OAuth depending on the surface.
result.description: Airwallex is a financial platform for businesses that supports payments, treasury, accounts, payouts, cards, and embedded finance use cases. It provides tools for integrating these capabilities in sandbox and production environments.

api_key_client.label: Client ID + API key
api_key_client.setup: In the [Airwallex web app](https://airwallex.com/app/), go to **Settings > Developer > API keys**. Generate either an admin API key or a scoped API key for your organization/account, then copy the API key and note the associated `Client ID` shown in the Developer app. Airwallex uses this pair to obtain an access token via the Authentication API. Only users with Owner, Admin, or Developer access to the Developer app can manage API keys.

partner_oauth_app.label: Partner OAuth client (client ID + client secret)
partner_oauth_app.setup: Request credentials from the Airwallex partner integrations team at [partner-integration@airwallex.com](mailto:partner-integration@airwallex.com). You will need a `client_id`, `client_secret`, approved scopes, and a redirect URI. After receiving credentials, create your listing in the Airwallex web app Connections area as described in [Get started](https://www.airwallex.com/docs/developer-tools/partner-connections/get-started).

sandbox_oauth_user.label: Airwallex sandbox OAuth authorization
sandbox_oauth_user.setup: Create a sandbox account at [Airwallex Sandbox signup](https://demo.airwallex.com/signup/sandbox), then connect from your MCP client or the Airwallex CLI and complete the browser-based OAuth flow. For CLI access use `airwallex auth login`; for the Developer MCP, point your MCP client at `https://mcp-demo.airwallex.com/developer` and approve the Airwallex OAuth consent flow.

prod_oauth_user.label: Airwallex production OAuth authorization
prod_oauth_user.setup: Sign in to the [Airwallex web app](https://airwallex.com/app/login) with an account that can grant OAuth consent. Owner, Admin, or Finance Admin users can authorize the Airwallex CLI and AgentOS/production MCP flows. Then run the relevant client login flow, such as `airwallex auth login --prod`, or connect the MCP endpoint `https://mcp.airwallex.com/mcp` from your MCP client and complete the OAuth flow in the browser.

requiredHeaders.name: Content-Type
requiredHeaders.description: Required on authentication/login requests shown in Airwallex examples.
